requirement_topic.en: Local Authorized Agent / Dealer and Labelling (MOCI / CITRA / Arabic & English)
requirement_topic.zh: 当地授权代理商/经销商及标注要求（MOCI / CITRA / 阿拉伯语与英语）
requirement_topic.zht: 當地授權代理商/經銷商及標注要求（MOCI / CITRA / 阿拉伯語與英語）

summary.en: Kuwait requires that imported telecommunications and electronic products be handled through a locally registered authorized agent or dealer. The Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MOCI) oversees import clearance and commercial registration requirements. The local agent must be a registered Kuwaiti commercial entity. Devices and packaging must carry Arabic and English dual-language labelling, including product name, model, brand, specifications (voltage, frequency, power), country of origin, CITRA type approval certificate number, importer/agent name and contact details in Kuwait, and relevant safety marks. Arabic is mandatory; English may appear alongside.
summary.zh: 科威特要求进口电信及电子产品须通过本地注册授权代理商或经销商处理。商业与工业部（MOCI）负责监管进口清关及商业注册要求。本地代理商须为注册的科威特商业实体。设备及包装须标注阿拉伯语与英语双语标注，包括产品名称、型号、品牌、规格（电压、频率、功率）、原产国、CITRA型号认证证书编号、在科威特的进口商/代理商名称及联系方式，以及相关安全标志。阿拉伯语为强制要求；英语可并列出现。
summary.zht: 科威特要求進口電信及電子產品須通過本地註冊授權代理商或經銷商處理。商業與工業部（MOCI）負責監管進口清關及商業註冊要求。本地代理商須為註冊的科威特商業實體。裝置及包裝須標注阿拉伯語與英語雙語標注，包括產品名稱、型號、品牌、規格（電壓、頻率、功率）、原產國、CITRA型號認證證書編號、在科威特的進口商/代理商名稱及聯繫方式，以及相關安全標誌。阿拉伯語為強制要求；英語可並列出現。

standards_or_laws: Kuwait Commercial Companies Law and MOCI Commercial Registration requirements
CITRA Type Approval Regulations (labelling of CITRA certificate number)
Kuwait Consumer Protection Law (Arabic labelling obligation)

summary.en: For China domestic market, there is no requirement to appoint a local agent equivalent to Kuwait's MOCI-registered dealer. CCC labelling (CCC mark, certificate number, manufacturer details, voltage/power, country of origin) is required for covered product categories in Chinese. For export, Chinese manufacturers typically do not face a local-agent requirement under Chinese law; that obligation arises under the destination country's import regulations.
summary.zh: 在中国国内市场，无需指定类似科威特MOCI注册经销商的本地代理商。CCC标注（CCC标志、证书编号、制造商信息、电压/功率、原产国）对覆盖产品类别以中文标注为强制要求。对于出口，中国制造商通常在中国法律下不面临本地代理商要求；该义务产生于目的地国家的进口法规。
summary.zht: 在中國國內市場，無需指定類似科威特MOCI註冊經銷商的本地代理商。CCC標注（CCC標誌、證書編號、製造商資訊、電壓/功率、原產國）對覆蓋產品類別以中文標注為強制要求。對於出口，中國製造商通常在中國法律下不面臨本地代理商要求；該義務產生於目的地國家的進口法規。

standards_or_laws: CCC Labelling Requirements (CNCA regulations — CCC mark, certificate number)
GB 7247.1 and related standards (CN safety labelling for laser/electrical products)
No equivalent CN law requiring a local Kuwait-style authorized dealer for domestic market

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting to Kuwait must: (1) appoint a locally registered Kuwaiti authorized agent or dealer before import can proceed — this is a prerequisite for MOCI import clearance and CITRA type approval application in many cases; (2) add Arabic-language labelling to all devices and packaging (Chinese or English-only labelling is not compliant); (3) include the CITRA type approval certificate number on the device label; and (4) include the Kuwait agent's name and local contact details on packaging. None of these are required under Chinese domestic market law.
gap.zh: 向科威特出口的中国制造商须：(1) 在进口前指定本地注册的科威特授权代理商或经销商 — 这在很多情况下是MOCI进口清关和CITRA型号认证申请的前提条件；(2) 在所有设备及包装上添加阿拉伯语标注（仅中文或英文标注不合规）；(3) 在设备标签上标注CITRA型号认证证书编号；(4) 在包装上标注科威特代理商名称及当地联系方式。上述要求均不在中国国内市场法律要求范围内。
gap.zht: 向科威特出口的中國製造商須：(1) 在進口前指定本地註冊的科威特授權代理商或經銷商 — 這在很多情況下是MOCI進口清關和CITRA型號認證申請的前提條件；(2) 在所有裝置及包裝上添加阿拉伯語標注（僅中文或英文標注不合規）；(3) 在裝置標籤上標注CITRA型號認證證書編號；(4) 在包裝上標注科威特代理商名稱及當地聯繫方式。上述要求均不在中國國內市場法律要求範圍內。

source.publisher: MOCI — Ministry of Commerce and Industry, State of Kuwait

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally registered Kuwaiti authorized agent or dealer is required for import clearance. Arabic and English dual-language labelling (including CITRA certificate number and local agent contact details) is mandatory on device and packaging. Chinese-only labelling is not compliant. These requirements have no direct equivalent in Chinese domestic market law.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进口清关须有本地注册的科威特授权代理商或经销商。设备及包装须强制标注阿拉伯语与英语双语（包括CITRA证书编号及当地代理商联系方式）。仅中文标注不合规。上述要求在中国国内市场法律中无直接对应规定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進口清關須有本地註冊的科威特授權代理商或經銷商。裝置及包裝須強制標注阿拉伯語與英語雙語（包括CITRA證書編號及當地代理商聯繫方式）。僅中文標注不合規。上述要求在中國國內市場法律中無直接對應規定。
